item.title: OV COMIC DUMP- Please help me save my cat
item.description:
Just realized I spelled OC in posting name wrong- oops!
https://gofund.me/07f27b50 I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories and laughs for over ten years here on Imgur. I actually first became a comic artist here thanks to my fellow imgurians asking for more, and because of that love and support it started my official comic “ristay” identity. Imgur has helped me before and I’m desperately hoping they can help me again. Diesel is our 10 year old cat who has been loved and cared for his whole life, he’s also a big part of a lot of my comics. Within the last 8 days he has developed jaundice and has been seen by our emergency and local vet. Sadly they have no idea what is causing his sickness and are sending us to a specialist. His labs at least show he doesn’t have pancreatitis, but he does have some abnormalities that have left the vets baffled. X-rays showed no tumors or enlargement of organs either, but hopefully this specialist will be able to exam him closer. We were given three types of medicine and are trying to get into the specialist in time. so far we’ve had to pay $1,537 for his two vet visits. The specialist hasn’t given us a full breakdown of money yet but from what we have asked it can range from $800-$1500 for his first appointment with their further testing. We put a down payment already of $800. This appointment will hopefully give us a diagnosis and then we can go from there. Following appointments will also have their fees but we are praying to at least get the emergency visits and the medication covered. On top of all of this, our vet warned us Diesel might need to be hospitalized for multiple days while they do aggressive care. As we cannot afford this right now we have him home on medicine but if it doesn’t work he will need to be admitted. This is our biggest concern for when it comes to costs and why I decided to make the go fund me. I put the fund’s goal with all of this in mind but I don’t actually know what the final amount will be. I don’t expect to reach the full goal amount, just thank you to everyone who has already donated or shared. If I can have even a part of this covered it would help us so much. I’m hoping that we can ask for help. I know money is tight for everyone right now so thank you for even just reading this and sending well wishes. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. Go fund me: https://gofund.me/07f27b50
item.dc:creator: ristay

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1305 (feral philosophers)
item.description:
Sorry this is so late, I slept through my alarm and barely made it to work in time! Let's get this bread.
Pippin tax! No Pippin message today, at work. ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: OC COMIC DUMP- help me save my cat
item.description:
https://gofund.me/07f27b50 I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories and laughs for over ten years here on Imgur. I actually first became a comic artist here thanks to my fellow imgurians asking for more, and because of that love and support it started my official comic “ristay” identity. Imgur has helped me before and I’m desperately hoping they can help me again. Diesel is our 10 year old cat who has been loved and cared for his whole life, he’s also a big part of a lot of my comics. Within the last 8 days he has developed jaundice and has been seen by our emergency and local vet. Sadly they have no idea what is causing his sickness and are sending us to a specialist. His labs at least show he doesn’t have pancreatitis, but he does have some abnormalities that have left the vets baffled. X-rays showed no tumors or enlargement of organs either, but hopefully this specialist will be able to exam him closer. We were given three types of medicine and are trying to get into the specialist in time. so far we’ve had to pay $1,537 for his two vet visits. The specialist hasn’t given us a full breakdown of money yet but from what we have asked it can range from $800-$1500 for his first appointment with their further testing. We put a down payment already of $800. This appointment will hopefully give us a diagnosis and then we can go from there. Following appointments will also have their fees but we are praying to at least get the emergency visits and the medication covered. On top of all of this, our vet warned us Diesel might need to be hospitalized for multiple days while they do aggressive care. As we cannot afford this right now we have him home on medicine but if it doesn’t work he will need to be admitted. This is our biggest concern for when it comes to costs and why I decided to make the go fund me. I put the fund’s goal with all of this in mind but I don’t actually know what the final amount will be. I don’t expect to reach the full goal amount, just thank you to everyone who has already donated or shared. If I can have even a part of this covered it would help us so much. I’m hoping that we can ask for help. I know money is tight for everyone right now so thank you for even just reading this and sending well wishes. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. Go fund me: https://gofund.me/07f27b50
Next comic dump: https://imgur.com/gallery/4DfR8Lw
item.dc:creator: ristay

14
15. Hey Imgur, so umm... I have an interesting update: I'm making a Release Date Announcement Reveal Trailer for Do Not Press The Button and a little know channel with a few subs called IGN picked up the trailer and will post it tomorrow for official world premiere! (20 March 2025). Stay tuned...

item.title: All the Americans in the replies sided with the driver lol
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: A buncha my doodles!
item.description:
Starting with an obligatory selfie post - notice the random Etch A Sketch stack on the ground. They propagate throughout every office I've ever had. I'm mostly known 'round these parts for my Etch A Sketch stuff, but I'm actually really really into doodling too! I hope you enjoy scrolling through some select favorites I done did doodled over the years.
My newest doodle! This probably took me around 6-8 hours. A point of pride for this doodle is that I worked on it almost exclusively during local craft meetups! It's been a goal of mine for years to get out and art with people IRL more, so this doodle serves as a testament to the mission accomplished.
Surprisingly enough, this is one of my largest doodles - I made this back in 2013. Note to self: explore more paint marker brands. I'd love to hear your suggestions if you have any!
This doodle was made early in the pandemic, back when I had wacky thoughts of making downloadable coloring book pages. They never flew off the shelves like I was hoping (I guess people don't wanna color viruses!) but I always loved how this felt more like a technical, medical type of illustration.
It's not often that I incorporate recognizable elements in my art. I'm still quite fond of this rendition and feel like the representational elements really mingled well with one another, even if they were all rendered as a part of a stream of consciousness.
This is the tiniest doodle I've ever doodled! If I were to wager a guess for how long this took, the answer is yes. (probably around 20 hours?).
This one time in college I made a jellyfish out of jellyfish!
I even made an umbrella out of it! The little jellyfish at the end were made from easter egg bottoms. If I could turn back time, there are two things in life I would do differently regarding this project: 1. I would trim my bangs 2. I would not forget the umbrella in a McDonald's where it is then stolen (thankfully I dismantled the jellyfish components from it, but that was an EXPENSIVE UMBRELLA and I'm still mad about it)
I feel like this doodle looks really good when you look at it from far away - a quality I rarely think about with my doodle work.
As a final post, here is a one-line Etch A Sketch stream of consciousness doodle (to tie it all together). I started doodling in 2009 and have made so many, so it's hard to pick favorites. I hope you enjoyed the small selection I chose to share today!
item.dc:creator: pikajane

item.title: Guess I'm boycotting Unilever products (that's a lot of stuff...)
item.description: Ben and Jerry's Boss thrown out by parent company Unilever because of public criticism of Trump. He also got in hot water with Unilever earlier for stating support for Palestinian refugees. This, despite an agreement made during the merger that Ben and Jerry's could continue to pursue their social missions for which they were known, and even set up an independent board to protect their values. I hope Unilever will be flooded with angry letters/emails. Please consider sending one yourself. https://www.unilever.com/contact/ Source: https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckg8pk9rpx4o
item.dc:creator: HerbyHuia

item.title: halifax fudge badger
item.description:
Barney: "How did you guys even become a country?"
Time flows a bit differently in Canada.
Canadian euphemisms are second to none.
They created an actual website to educate the world about Canadian intimacy.
Although Barney acknowledges all the amazing contributions Canada has made to the world.
The beauty that is Robin Sparkles.
Barney's take on how the Canadian citizenship test is conducted.
Barney has a strong dislike for Canadian currency.

item.title: This seems like a proper starting point in basically any discussion of what’s happening in Gaza.
item.description: So many bad actors simply want to muddy the waters in these discussions. When someone can’t even get their head around this, it’s an immediate pass by me on trying to engage with them. Most Viral Edit: unexpected, but appreciated. Apparently the opinion that Palestinian citizens are human beings and should be treated as such is controversial. I encourage you to consider these words in the spirit they were written: a plea for compassion and humanity for a war-ravaged people. May we know some semblance of peace in our lifetimes. Much love to you
item.dc:creator: TheOlDickTwist

item.title: "Wealth hoarder upset to improve access to affordable housing" shameful headline writing by the BBC

item.dc:creator: What3Birds

item.title: Punk Rock Museum(Las Vegas, NV) highlights
item.description:
As a trans woman, this def put me in my feels. I needed to hear this 30 years ago so that’s why even though I’m terrified, visibility is so important for the next generation. Most Viral edit:Being kind is punk af. In an age of division and vitriol, look for the helpers.
Would this be deserving of the selfie ban? Will remove if necessary, just love those jackets.
I’ve seen Gogol Bordello 10 times and they have never had a bad show.
I GOT TO PLAY EUGENE HUTZ’S GUITAR!? I’m still squealing from that excitement.
Ladies Room ‘art’.
The irony/self awareness of ‘no stickers on the glass’ is hilarious to me.
No need to go to Paris!
item.dc:creator: DaymanAhAAAAah

item.title: Orgasmic sounds
item.dc:creator: Cliperinoposterino

item.title: In search of places unseen.
item.description: When I lived in Stockholm, Sweden and I was starting to pick up photography I used to wander semi-aimlessly. I'd go somewhere I'd never been before and just walk around looking at the world through the viewfinder. More often than not I went to places on the outskirts of town: industrial areas or largely corporate areas – places where people go to work and then leave. Transitional places, places where people move but doesn't linger. Naturally there are places like this in cities themselves, like the one depicted above; a small staircase used by the people living in the area to go to and from work. The little public square with the bench is rarely used; it is more of an expression of practicality, as if to show that society is present. However, when used it is primarily by those that exist at the edge, or outside, of society. The drunks, the junkies, the homeless, the mentally ill – the Unseen. One of the people I never came across in person during my wanderings, but who's presence was felt wherever I went was "psykos" [Psychosis]. A fellow wanderer in the gaps of the world. I did some searching on who was hiding behind the alias once. The picture that emerged was that of a troubled individual, and inhabitant of the unseen world. Drugs, alcohol and expressing their diagnosis in street art. There was a film being developed about them. I should look up if the movie ever got released. If interested, you can find my photography at https://reality-inflicted.com Edit for most viral: wow.
item.dc:creator: RealityInflicted
